description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named On PUSH - Linux Special Builds for main branch that runs on push to the main branch, excluding tags and paths ending in .md, and on workflow dispatch. The workflow should use a ubuntu-22.04 job to check out the repository, install dependencies including conan and lxml, configure conan, install the package with conan, build with cmake, run tests with ctest, and upload coverage to Codecov.
